_comment: Org assurance POLICY as DATA -- the standard the board judges against. Customer artifact (clean core, not in SAP). assurance.py reads this; the deterministic checks run it over the real objects to produce FINDINGS. Edit values here, no code change. policies.md is the human rationale.

plant_extension._comment: Promoted from the recurring correction 'first extend the materials'. Every BOM component must be extended to the assembly's plant or it can't be added to the plant BOM / procured / produced there.
